site.title: Saniyat Hossain — Staff Software Engineer
site.description: Staff Software Engineer crafting resilient backends, telco-scale platforms and mobile apps — PHP, Laravel, Node.js and microservices, shipped with quiet precision.
site.keywords: Saniyat Hossain, Staff Software Engineer, Laravel, PHP, Node.js, microservices, Dhaka, Bangladesh
site.aboutHeading: I started on a monolith carrying telco-scale traffic, and spent {years}+ years learning to take it apart without anyone noticing — into microservices, into AI-assisted delivery, always shipped with quiet precision.
site.aboutLead: I still write the backend myself — architecture, APIs, and platform engineering, hands-on from design through production. The systems change (telco-scale platforms, SaaS, coaching products); the discipline of staying calm under load doesn't.
site.footerTagline: Staff Software Engineer crafting backends, products, and the systems that connect them.
site.ogDescription: Backend engineering, shipped with quiet precision. {years}+ years building PHP/Laravel and Node.js services at scale.
site.twitterDescription: Backend engineering, shipped with quiet precision.

services.title: Backend Development
services.desc: Scalable PHP/Laravel and Node.js services built to last.

services.title: Architecture & Microservices
services.desc: Monolith-to-microservice migrations with clear design patterns.

services.title: API Design & Integration
services.desc: BFF, API Gateway, and async APIs for telco-scale products.

services.title: AI-Assisted Delivery
services.desc: AIDLC workflows with Claude, Cursor, and Copilot in the loop.

experiences.summary: Leading backend and mobile app architecture, design, infrastructure planning and development for a coaching-center application — scalable PHP/Laravel and Node.js APIs with MySQL optimization and AI-assisted (AIDLC) delivery.
details: Coaching-center app: leading backend & mobile architecture, design and infra planning.
Scalable PHP/Laravel and Node.js APIs with MySQL query optimization.
Ecom Intelligence — SaaS multi-tenant e-commerce: solution design and implementation of tenant subdomain routing and request-handling architecture.
Leveraged AI-assisted workflows (AIDLC) to improve feature delivery, security and performance.

experiences.summary: Led solution design, feature delivery, backend development and code reviews for the Grameenphone MyGP squad — Redis optimization, async APIs, BFF/API Gateway and a large monolith-to-microservices migration.
details: Custom internal PHP packages for Redis optimization, fail-over and asynchronous API calls across monolith and microservices.
Internal library for custom cURL handling, feature-toggled DB/query logging, mock services (Mockoon), Docker and Nginx header-based routing for safe testing.
Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) and API Gateway POC consolidating backend services into optimized async responses, cutting network latency.
Refactored and migrated a large monolith into microservices with design patterns and separation of concerns for scalability and resiliency.
Optimized a global-configuration API using Redis caching with microservice fallback to minimize redundant service calls.
Change Data Capture (CDC) POC with Go, MySQL and Elasticsearch Data Shipper for near real-time sync.
Owned quarterly Rocks and aligned technical execution across squads via L10 meetings.
Features: Auth, Card, Balance, Offers, Star Offers, Pack Purchase/Gifting, Live Score, API Gateway, one-tap payments, Usage History, Partner Integrations, SSO Journeys, Backoffice, PHP upgrade.

experiences.summary: Refactored and segregated the monolithic MyGP back-end into microservices. Managed event queues, cron jobs and database query optimization.
details: Refactored monolithic MyGP back-end into microservices for scalability.
Managed event queues, cron jobs and optimized database queries.

experiences.summary: Joined on contract and contributed to the initial phases of the MyGP back-end project.
details: Contributed to initial phases of the MyGP back-end project.

experiences.summary: Built a Warehouse & Logistics Management System with dynamic, configurable workflow journeys and dynamic billing across multiple logistics companies under a single management point.
details: Dynamic, configurable workflow journeys for warehouse & logistics operations.
Dynamic billing management streamlining operations for multiple logistics companies.
Developed a Firebase-based Cloud Messaging system.

experiences.summary: As Team Lead, delivered a comprehensive Human Resource Information System (HRIS) with Role-Based Access Control and efficient workflow management across multiple modules.
details: HRIS modules: Performance Management Development System, Training Development Information System, E-recruitment System, Scientific Ranking System, Certificate Management System.
Role-Based Access Control and workflow management across modules.
Developed a research-based web application.

experiences.summary: Shipped responsive portals — news, jobs, online study/exam/result management and domain-registration automation — with desktop and mobile performance optimization.
details: Responsive news portal and job portal.
Online study, exam and result management application.
Domain-registration automation with access control, reporting, auditing, payment gateway and DNS-via-cron.
Web performance optimization: render-blocking avoidance, browser caching, GZIP, minification, PageSpeed module.

experiences.summary: Designed and developed responsive websites, a social-networking web application and e-commerce platforms for clients.
details: Responsive websites with CodeIgniter and Joomla.
Social-networking web application on the Elgg PHP framework.
Garments portals, company sites and e-commerce platforms.
